# `license_entitlement` stanza

@include 'alerts/enterprise-only.mdx'

<Note title="Required when using an IBM PAO license">
  You must configure the `license_entitlement` to start up a Vault Enterprise
  server with an IBM PAO license. You do not need an entitlement stanza for
  HashiCorp licenses.
</Note>

The `license_entitlement` stanza provides the entitlement details associated with
your IBM PAO license for your Vault server.

Vault fails to start and logs an error that it could not find a valid license if
the configured parameters do not match the entitlements detailed in your IBM PAO
license.

If the configured parameters match multiple entitlements in the license, Vault
uses the entitlement with the termination date farthest in the future.

```hcl
license_entitlement {
  edition = "premium"
  add_ons = "advanced-data-protection-key-management, advanced-data-protection"
}
```

## `license_entitlement` parameters

- `edition` `(string: <required>)` - The Vault Enterprise edition specified in
  your IBM PAO license entitlement. Must be one of: `standard`, `plus`, `premium`.
- `add_ons` `(string: "")` - A comma-separated list of additional features/modules
  specified in your IBM PAO license entitlement for Vault. For example, advanced
  data protection (`advanced-data-protection`) or key management
  (`advanced-data-protection-key-management`).
